round1: Round 1 is over, and it's clear most of you were guessing. While Derrick managed to nail the Tampa Bay upset and a couple of others, Marc, Jaclyn, Steph, and Nickall collectively couldn't pick a winner if it wore a flashing neon sign, especially with Nashville and Detroit making fools of your Anaheim and Phoenix picks. Seriously, did anyone even watch hockey?
round2: Round 2 saw Boston and Tampa Bay sweep their way through, making most of your game counts look like wild guesses. Steph, picking the wrong team to get swept in 4 games is a special kind of wrong, while Nickall managed to pick the loser in the exact right number of games twice – truly a masterclass in futility.
round3: Round 3 is done, and while Steph actually got something right with Vancouver in 5, the rest of you collectively decided the Sharks were a good bet. For those who thought Tampa Bay had a chance, that's just adorable.
round4: Well, the Bruins lifted the Cup in 7, proving that Marc is either a genius or just lucky enough to be the only one who didn't buy into the Canucks hype. The rest of you can now officially start your off-season of regret.
overall: Well, folks, the 2011 NHL playoffs are in the books, and the Boston Bruins are your champions. Marc, with a truly "dominant" 15 points, managed to secure his fourth championship, leaving a trail of utterly bewildered competitors in his wake. Derrick, Jaclyn, Stephanie, and Nickall all collectively managed to score a whopping zero points in the final round, proving that picking a winner is apparently harder than it looks. Jaclyn, fresh off a championship win last year, plummeted from hero to zero, while Nickall, still tragically seeking his first title after four years, proudly joined the goose egg club. What a truly forgettable performance from almost everyone involved.
